$comment: Long Beach Island, NJ sources. Two confirmed-working venues to start: Bird & Betty's (Squarespace events collection) and Joe Pop's (Squarespace site but the events page embeds a public Google Calendar — we fetch its iCal feed directly). Remaining venues are platforms our existing adapters don't cleanly handle yet; disabled with notes so the auto-probe system can revisit, and so admins can swap them to manual-oneoff if they want to seed dates by hand.

sources.name: Bird & Betty's
sources.notes: Squarespace site — events collection at /events/ (~58 upcoming). Misses daytime-only events because they don't get posted here.

sources.name: Joe Pop's Shore Bar
sources.notes: Squarespace site (joepops.com), but events live in a public Google Calendar embedded on /events. We fetch the calendar's iCal export directly (~200 events). To update the calendar source, see the data-src attribute on Joe Pop's /events page.

sources.name: Black-Eyed Susan's
sources.notes: Squarespace site. The /happenings page is a single anchor-targeted section on the home page, not a Squarespace events collection. No JSON feed. Disable until they create one, or switch to manual-oneoff to seed dates by hand.

sources.name: The Old Causeway Steak & Oyster House
sources.notes: Squarespace site, but they explicitly don't list upcoming shows on their public pages. No events collection found at any common path. Disable; admin can switch to manual-oneoff if dates appear elsewhere.

sources.name: Surf City Hotel
sources.notes: Static custom HTML page on /entertainment.html — no event plugin, no calendar feed, content appears to be a single edited paragraph rather than structured listings (current page references an October 2023 Halloween show). Disable; use manual-oneoff for specific dated entertainment.

sources.name: Daddy O LBI
sources.notes: Wix site using the Wix Events app. Wix doesn't expose a public events API without an OAuth instance ID; reachable only via their dynamic JS bundle. Needs a dedicated wix-events adapter or manual-oneoff seeding.

sources.name: The Sandpaper
sources.notes: Local LBI newspaper. WordPress + GeoDirectory plugin (CPT gd_event) but their REST endpoints (/wp-json/wp/v2/gd_event, /wp-json/geodir/v2/posts) all 404 — likely behind a paywall or restricted. Their event sitemap (/gd_event-sitemap.xml) lists URLs but the dates in lastmod are stale (2020). Needs a GeoDirectory adapter or sitemap-scrape approach.

sources.name: LBI Lowdown
sources.notes: Existing local-events aggregator. WordPress but the wp-json REST endpoint 302-redirects (probably to login). Aggregators often don't want to be re-aggregated; consider reaching out for partnership before scraping.
